news.headline: BioPorto releases record-breaking Annual Report for 2024.
Diversified Energy Company PLC announces change in PDMR holdings of Ordinary Shares due to vesting of PSU's and RSU's.
news.summary: Diversified Energy Company PLC (LSE: DEC) (NYSE: DEC) recently disclosed the vesting of specific Performance Stock Units ("PSU's") and Restricted Stock Units ("RSU's") awarded to key Persons Discharging Material Responsibility ("PDMRs"). As a result, there has been an adjustment in the PDMR holdings of Ordinary Shares worth £0.20 each in the Company.

news.headline: Directors at Diversified Energy Company PLC (LSE: DEC) and (NYSE: DEC) bought/sold Ordinary Shares on March 18-19, 2025.
news.summary: Diversified Energy Company PLC recently disclosed that on March 18-19, 2025, certain members of the Board participated in transactions involving the company's Ordinary Shares of 20 pence each. The company's shares are listed on the London Stock Exchange (LSE: DEC) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: DEC).

news.headline: Diversified Energy implements Share Buyback Program; shares of DEC (LSE: DEC) and (NYSE: DEC) affected.
news.summary: In Birmingham, Alabama on March 20, 2025, Diversified Energy Company PLC disclosed information about a Share Buyback Program (the "Program"). The company, listed on the London Stock Exchange under the ticker DEC and on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker DEC, provided specifics about the parameters of the Program.

news.headline: Starlight Cardiovascular in Fort Lauderdale works to save children with congenital heart disease, impacting countless families nationwide.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on March 20, 2025, Starlight Cardiovascular is making waves with its innovative approach to developing life-saving technologies for children afflicted with congenital heart disease, which impacts numerous families across the country. The company is dedicated to transforming the landscape of pediatric cardiac care by introducing cutting-edge solutions to address this pressing health concern.

news.headline: Brainomix raises £14M ($18M) in Series C round for AI imaging tech in healthcare, focusing on stroke and lung fibrosis.
news.summary: A startup originating from the University of Oxford is rapidly expanding its presence in the United States with an advanced AI imaging solution for stroke, showing significant benefits for critical treatments. The company has secured funding to further promote the adoption of its groundbreaking technology in diagnosing lung fibrosis. This development marks a crucial step in advancing medical innovation, enhancing patient care, and reaching a wider market.

news.headline: Cetim and MIRDC join forces at JEC World 2025 to accelerate industry decarbonization through a new partnership.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Kaohsiung, a significant agreement was reached at JEC World 2025 between Cetim, a leading technical center in the mechanical industry, and Taiwan's Metal Industries Research and Development Centre (MIRDC). Through a memorandum of understanding (MOU), the two entities established a partnership with a specific emphasis on collaboration in research and development. This partnership aims to leverage the expertise of Cetim and MIRDC to advance innovation in the mechanical industry. The MOU sets the framework for joint projects, knowledge sharing, and technology transfer between the two organizations. This collaboration is expected to facilitate the exchange of ideas and best practices in the industry and drive advancements in mechanical technology.

news.headline: GCOA and Transamerica Institute urge action to promote travel for healthy aging. Report stresses benefits.
news.summary: A recent study published by the Global Coalition on Aging (GCOA) in partnership with the Transamerica Institute sheds light on the numerous advantages that travel offers to elderly populations. The report, titled "Leveraging Travel as a Catalyst for Healthy Aging," emphasizes the positive impacts of travel on health, economy, and society. Released in New York and Los Angeles on March 20, 2025, the report underscores the significant benefits for the aging demographic. Whether it be physical, mental, or social well-being, the findings showcase how travel plays a vital role in enhancing the overall quality of life for older individuals. This research provides valuable insights into the ways in which travel can contribute to the well-being of aging populations, with statistics and data supporting its claims.

news.headline: Zscaler AI Security Report shows 3,000% surge in enterprise use of AI/ML tools, 45.2% traffic from ChatGPT, top industries are Finance & Insurance and Manufacturing. US, India lead in transactions. 536 billion AI transactions, 3,624 TB data sent to AI tools, 59.9% transactions blocked. Threat actors leveraging AI for attacks.
news.summary: ChatGPT is the most widely used AI/ML application, comprising 45.2% of all AI/ML transactions, and also the most blocked AI application, with Grammarly and Microsoft Copilot following suit. Agentic AI and DeepSeek are enabling threat actors to weaponize AI. The top countries for AI transactions are the US, India, UK, Germany, and Japan. Finance & Insurance and Manufacturing industries lead in AI traffic. Zscaler's ThreatLabz 2025 AI Security Report indicates a 3,000%+ growth in AI tools usage, with 3,624 TB of data transmitted to these tools. Enterprises blocked 59.9% of AI transactions due to security concerns. Threat actors are leveraging AI to enhance attacks. Zscaler emphasizes the need for secure data handling in AI innovation.

news.headline: Currency Strength Chart: Strongest - JPY, CHF, USD, CAD, EUR, GBP, AUD, NZD - Weakest
Alvotech acquires Xbrane's operations and Cimizia candidate, strengthening biosimilars leadership, mulling Swedish market listing.
news.summary: Alvotech has recently completed the acquisition of all operations of Xbrane, along with the Cimizia biosimilar candidate. This acquisition marks a significant expansion of Alvotech's development capabilities. They are now contemplating a listing on the Swedish market as part of their growth strategy. This move will not only enhance their portfolio but also strengthen their position in the industry.

news.headline: IPOPEMA gives Buy rating to Šiaulių Bankas, with target price of EUR 1.20, 28% upside potential from current value.
news.summary: IPOPEMA, a prominent independent investment bank in Poland, commenced sponsored equity research coverage on Šiaulių Bankas on March 19, 2025. The bank assigned a "Buy" rating and set a target price of EUR 1.20 per share for the company. This target price indicates a substantial 28% upside potential compared to the bank's present market value.

news.headline: Alvotech acquires Xbrane's R&D operations in Sweden and a biosimilar candidate, expanding biosimilar development with focus on XB003. Plans listing on Nasdaq Stockholm.
news.summary: Global biotech company Alvotech (NASDAQ: ALVO) has acquired Xbrane Biopharma AB's R&D operations and a biosimilar candidate, expanding its development capabilities and entering the Swedish life science sector. The Acquisition includes Xbrane's R&D base at Campus Solna, Karolinska Institute in Sweden, and biosimilar candidate XB003, referencing Cimzia® (certolizumab pegol). Xbrane will retain other pre-clinical assets for commercialization. Alvotech is also considering a future listing of Swedish Depository Receipts (SDR), equity share equivalents, on Nasdaq Stockholm.

news.headline: Intermediate Capital Group plc reports significant change in shareholding, triggering notification of major holdings. #ICG #stocks
NB Private Equity Partners announced a transaction in its own shares, restricted in certain countries.
news.summary: The data provided in this document is not intended for release, publication, or distribution in Australia, Canada, Italy, Denmark, Japan, the United States, or to any resident of these countries.

news.headline: Peter Kukielski to resign from Norsk Hydro ASA Board of Directors at AGM on May 9, 2025.
news.summary: Peter Kukielski revealed plans to step down from the Board of Directors of Norsk Hydro ASA on May 9, 2025, during the upcoming Annual General Meeting.

news.headline: Boliden releases Annual and Sustainability Report 2024 on www.boliden.com, covering strategy, operations, sustainability, and financials.
news.summary: In Stockholm, the Annual and Sustainability Report for the year 2024 from Boliden is officially released, accessible at www.boliden.com. This comprehensive report delves into various aspects of Boliden's operations, including strategy, sustainability, and financial performance, illustrating the value the company generates. The theme tying the report together is "A..." Interested individuals can visit the website to explore the detailed insights presented in the report.

news.headline: Rocket Doctor rapidly scales in Alberta, boosting physician independence and patient care with Treatment.com AI Inc. (CSE: TRUE, OTC: TREIF, Frankfurt: 939).
news.summary: Treatment.com AI Inc. has reported significant growth and expansion of their Rocket Doctor platform in Alberta. By providing support to independent physicians, the company is focusing on improving patient access to care. Trading as CSE: TRUE, OTC: TREIF, and Frankfurt: 939, Treatment's efforts aim to address the increasing demand for healthcare services in the region.

news.headline: Diversified Energy Co. PLC (LSE: DEC) plans to hold investor calls from March 24, 2025, for a potential US$ bond offering.
news.summary: Diversified Energy Company PLC (LSE: DEC) (NYSE: DEC), an independent energy firm specializing in natural gas and liquids operations, has selected DNB Markets, a division of DNB Bank ASA, as the Sole Bookrunner to coordinate a set of fixed income investor discussions starting on March 24, 2025. After these investor calls, the Company plans to launch a four-year offering of senior secured notes in US dollars. This offering, known as the "Contemplated Bond Offering," is dependent on various factors, including market conditions.

Lenovo and Trifork collaborate on AI-driven quality inspection for manufacturing industry.
CFX Portal Wallet to be delisted due to security risks; users advised to switch to Fluent wallet for safety. #Conflux #CFX
news.summary: The Conflux (CFX)Portal wallet is being taken down from the Chrome plugin market because of security concerns. Users are encouraged to transition to the Fluent wallet for better protection and assistance. This move comes amidst rising concerns over cybersecurity, affecting a significant number of users who rely on the Conflux wallet. By shifting to the Fluent wallet, users can ensure enhanced security features and reliable support, ultimately safeguarding their digital assets.

news.headline: Bitfinex stresses importance of strong security measures for crypto traders to safeguard assets from cyber threats.
news.summary: Bitfinex underscores the significance of implementing strong security protocols for cryptocurrency traders in safeguarding their assets against cyber threats and phishing attacks. It is crucial for traders to prioritize security measures to prevent any potential loss of their digital assets.

news.headline: Mass Timber plays key role in Albina Community Redevelopment Program, discussed at International Mass Timber Conference on March 25-27 at Oregon Convention Center. Keynote address on March 26, 8:00 am, focuses on Portland redevelopment.
news.summary: The upcoming International Mass Timber Conference is set to take place in Portland, Oregon from March 25th to 27th at the Oregon Convention Center. The event will kick off with the opening Keynote address titled "Mass Timber for the People" on Wednesday, March 26th from 8:00 am to 9:15 am. The keynote speech will delve into the topic of Portland area redevelopment.

news.headline: ScaleFlux leads in efficient infrastructure amid AI growth, battling bottlenecks to optimize bandwidth and reduce latency.
news.summary: The fast progression of artificial intelligence (AI) technology is driving a need for more effective infrastructure, outpacing traditional systems. ScaleFlux, a prominent provider of AI and data center storage solutions, is leading the charge by addressing key obstacles and enhancing bandwidth for lower latency. This move comes at a crucial time with the global AI market expected to reach $190 billion by 2025, highlighting the significance of infrastructure advancement in this sector.

news.headline: Avesha's Smart Scaler AI tool boosts performance up to 3x through Reinforcement Learning, saving costs. Boston & SF, Mar 19, 2025.
news.summary: Avesha's Smart Scaler has unveiled an innovative scaling solution for AI workloads, harnessing Reinforcement Learning technology. This cutting-edge solution promises remarkable performance improvements and cost savings. The announcement was made in Boston and San Francisco on March 19, 2025. Avesha's Smart Scaler, a component of its Elastic AI platform, aims to revolutionize the field.

news.headline: Young Futures is launching the Call Me Maybe Challenge, a $500,000 initiative supported by Pinterest and Pivotal, aiming to rethink phone use in schools.
news.summary: A funding initiative called the Call Me Maybe Challenge, worth $500,000, has been introduced by Young Futures in collaboration with Pinterest and supported by Pivotal. This initiative, which has received backing from organizations led by Melinda French Gates and the Susan Crown Exchange, aims to encourage the development of innovative solutions led by students that can benefit schools.

news.headline: Coghlin Companies unites engineering teams of Cogmedix and Columbia Tech to enhance innovation efficiency, forming a new Product Development Group.
news.summary: Coghlin Companies is enhancing its dedication to innovation efficiency by officially introducing its integrated Product Development Group. This move brings together the engineering and commercialization capabilities of Cogmedix and Columbia Tech to form a unified, ISO-compliant entity. The new group is focused on speeding up the development and launch process.

news.headline: SIAE Microelettronica unveils Quad-Carrier Microwave System with 4Gbps throughput in compact outdoor enclosure.
news.summary: A company specializing in licensed microwave backhaul solutions, SIAE MICROELETTRONICA, has introduced a new technology on March 19, 2025. This innovation involves four individual RF carriers that can operate simultaneously, providing a high throughput of up to 4Gbps. Encased in a compact, all-weather outdoor enclosure, this solution is designed to deliver efficient communication capabilities.

news.headline: New platform Justice Design News launched for courthouse and police facility construction. Based in Richmond, Calif. - PRNewswire, March 19, 2025.
news.summary: A new online news platform called Justice Design News is now available, with a strong focus on reporting about the design and construction of courthouses, correctional venues, and police facilities. Launched in Richmond, California, on March 19, 2025, Justice Design News aims to become a go-to source for industry professionals looking for the latest updates in this sector. The platform offers comprehensive coverage and insights on various projects, trends, and innovations in the field. This initiative has already garnered attention and interest within the industry since its launch.

news.headline: David Samuels joins Signature Resolution's panel of neutrals with 30+ years in hotel/travel industry.
news.summary: David Samuels, a veteran in the hotel and travel sector, is set to join Signature Resolution's panel of neutrals. With over three decades of experience, Samuels will contribute significantly to the company's alternative dispute resolution services. This announcement was made on March 19, 2025, in Los Angeles.

news.headline: William Stanley CFO Group acquires Craft &Company CPAs, expanding its services. Announcement made in TAMPA, Fla., March 19, 2025. (Char. count: 126)
news.summary: The boutique financial services firm, the William Stanley CFO Group, has acquired Craft & Company CPAs, specializing in financial leadership and fractional Chief Financial Officer services. The acquisition was announced in Tampa, Florida on March 19, 2025.

news.headline: Entourage Yearbooks awards 2024 Next Generation Grants to schools lacking resources, aiding natural disaster-affected communities.
news.summary: A program known as the Next Generation Grant by Entourage Yearbooks has been established to support the yearbook community. This initiative aids schools lacking necessary resources, such as equipment and programs, as well as those impacted by natural disasters. The grant aims to ensure that students and communities receive the educational opportunities they deserve. The company, based in Princeton, N.J., launched this effort in March.

news.headline: Ziegler secures $83.94M financing for Westminster through Series 2025 Bonds via New Hope Cultural Education Corp.
news.summary: Ziegler, a well-known national boutique investment bank, has confirmed the completion of the financing for Westminster's latest project. The $83,940,000 Series 2025 Bonds were issued through the New Hope Cultural Education Facilities Finance Corporation. This successful transaction marks a significant milestone for Ziegler and demonstrates their expertise in managing large-scale financial operations. The announcement was made in Chicago on March 19, 2025, highlighting the firm's ongoing commitment to facilitating strategic investments in various sectors.

news.headline: Gatekeeper introduces LuminIQ, AI solution for vendor and contract management, improves efficiency with Lumin Agent; future expansions planned.
news.summary: A new AI-driven intelligence layer named LuminIQ has been introduced by Gatekeeper to enhance risk detection and improve vendor and contract management processes. The initial AI Agent, called the 'Lumin Agent,' has been launched to automate workflow approvals, ensuring adherence to regulations and speeding up operations. The deployment of additional Lumin Agents is planned for the future to further optimize processes.

news.headline: VXI & Harvard Business School launch Empowering Leaders program for employees, bridging diversity gaps & driving career growth.
news.summary: In an effort to enhance employee leadership skills and promote diversity in the workplace, VXI Global Solutions has joined forces with Harvard Business School to introduce the Empowering Leaders initiative. This program offers valuable leadership training, access to HBS coursework, and immersive client experiences to employees. The partnership aims to address diversity gaps and foster career development opportunities. The collaboration was officially announced in Los Angeles on March 19, 2025, via a press release distributed on PRNewswire-PRWeb.

news.headline: ShipIn Systems names Daniela Krispin as CTO, with 20 years of experience. Leading in maritime AI technology.
news.summary: ShipIn Systems, a prominent player in maritime artificial intelligence technology, has named Daniela Krispin as its new Chief Technology Officer (CTO). Krispin, who boasts more than two decades of experience overseeing research and development teams in startup and corporate settings, is set to leverage her extensive expertise in her new role.

news.headline: Myocardial Solutions showcased MyoStrain™ tech at SCMR, revolutionizing cardiac assessment. MRI-based innovation provides insights into function.
news.summary: At the recent SCMR conference, Myocardial Solutions presented their groundbreaking MyoStrain™ technology, changing the way healthcare providers evaluate and address cardiac health. This innovative MRI-focused tool offers accurate and non-invasive analysis of myocardial function.

news.headline: New children's series "Seek and Find" promotes positive values, sales benefit Hope Rescue Ranch in Englewood, Fla.
news.summary: Proceeds from the sales of author Sandy Watter's latest children's book, "Love, Hope, and Faith Play Seek and Find!: A Positive Word, Horse in..." will benefit the Hope Rescue Ranch in Englewood, Florida. The book, inspired by Jesus to spread positivity, is set to be released on March 19, 2025. Readers interested in supporting this cause through book purchases can do so by participating in this charitable initiative.

news.headline: Adolfo Velasquez, CEO, leads buyout of Military Brands, with VP Suzanne McCurdy, for growth and innovation.
news.summary: CEO Adolfo Velasquez, VP Suzanne McCurdy, and key leaders have orchestrated a buyout to boost Military Brands' growth. This move signifies a pivotal moment in expanding the company's reach to provide crucial information to the military.

news.headline: OMRON partners with NVIDIA Omniverse for digital twin manufacturing solutions. Demonstrating at NVIDIA GTC 2025 with CEO Jensen Huang's keynote speech.
news.summary: During NVIDIA GTC 2025, OMRON will showcase the integration of its inspection machine and automation technologies with NVIDIA Omniverse, aiming to enhance operational efficiency for factory automation developers. The keynote address by NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang highlighted OMRON's digital twin technology as an innovative solution. This collaboration is expected to streamline processes and drive advancements in the industry, attracting significant attention at the event.

news.headline: Operation Healing Forces sets up an $11M future endowment with RAF Strategies' Charitable Endowment Plan™ for long-term support.
news.summary: Operation Healing Forces has secured a bright future with the creation of an $11 million endowment through the Charitable Endowment Plan™ (CEP). The initiative guarantees ongoing support and leaves a lasting impact. RAF Strategies highlights this achievement in San Diego on March 19, 2025.
